base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of app_icon_hero_portrait — a ui (portrait) from 1986 dragon quest. Mobile app-icon — hero portrait with sword/shield. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mobile app-icon — hero portrait with sword/shield; Akira Toriyama-style illustration as launcher icon. Ships with mobile remaster
